commands.review_summary:
The PR routes several OpenAI plugin success response reads through `readResponseWithLimit` with 1 MiB caps and adds OAuth/realtime bounded-read unit tests plus Response mock updates.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +147. Total +182 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR head applies 1 MiB caps to image and batch file-content success bodies while the current code carries large base64 image and batch output payloads, and OAuth still prebuffers before the changed parse.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor real behavior proof and maintainer-reviewed cap/placement fixes are needed before merge; ClawSweeper should not start repair automation while the proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(openai): bound JSON/text response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Replace unbounded `await response.json()`/`text()` with `readResponseWithLimit`
(1 MiB cap) across OpenAI realtime/oauth/image-generation/embedding-batch providers
(6 call sites in 4 files) — the symmetric counterpart to bound-stream work in
#95420, #95417, #95218.

A malicious or faulty OpenAI API endpoint returning an oversized response body would
previously buffer the entire body in memory before parsing.

## Evidence

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/openai/

 Test Files  27 passed (27)
      Tests  331 passed (331)
   Duration  51.91s
```

### New bounded-response overflow tests

- **OAuth flow**: `rejects oversized token exchange JSON response without using response.text()` — streams > 1 MiB, verifies overflow Error, stream cancelled, no unbounded text()
- **Realtime provider shared** (new file): valid-response + oversized-rejection tests

### Test mock fixes

Mock Response objects in `image-generation-provider.test.ts` and `index.test.ts` were upgraded from plain `{ json: async () => ... }` to real `new Response(...)` objects.

## Changed files

| File | Sites |
|------|------:|
| `extensions/openai/embedding-batch.ts` | 2 |
| `extensions/openai/image-generation-provider.ts` | 1 |
| `extensions/openai/openai-chatgpt-oauth-flow.runtime.ts` | 1 |
| `extensions/openai/realtime-provider-shared.ts` | 1 |

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
